headline: Agentic engineering moved to the center of the AI coding conversation as practitioners reframed the model as a fraction of what makes systems work.
body: The dominant thread this window is the shift from raw code generation toward agentic engineering and the surrounding harness, with one playbook arguing the model is only 10 percent of development success and context, tools, guardrails, and verification are the other 90 percent, and another mapping the spectrum from vibe coding to orchestration. Adjacent pieces detail building an Agentic OS atop Claude Code, observations on how code style affects LLM token costs, and a programmer's worry that human review and deep understanding are being de-emphasized as Claude becomes the primary code tool. On evaluation, Latent Space frames Meta's testing harnesses as an emerging industry standard. Separately, Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, and Europe pushed back on Washington's chip export restrictions, with ASML noting Chinese access is limited to decade-old lithography tools.

cited_items.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities - BBC
